第3格

第4格

第5格
标题：4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡

配图元素：咖啡杯、茶杯、禁止符号

第6格
标题：5. 睡前洗个热水澡

配图元素：浴室蒸汽、毛巾、热水
第7格
标题：6. 脑子停不下来就写下来

配图元素：笔记本、钢笔、小台灯
第8格
标题：7. 固定上床时间
正文：每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。
配图元素：时钟、月亮、床
第9格
标题：8. 试试深呼吸放松法
正文：吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。

避免：海报感、影楼感、电商感、动漫感、cosplay感、乱标注、错结构、糊字、假材质、过度装饰。

final_prompt.prompt:
生成一张适合小红书发布的 3:4 竖版九宫格海报，整体为 3列 × 3行 排版，九个宫格边界清晰，方便后期直接切割成 9 张单图发布。整体风格干净、高级、统一，适合女性向健康生活方式内容，具有小红书爆款封面气质。画面要求 信息排版清晰、文字大、可读性强、留白舒服、配色温柔治愈。

整体视觉风格：
奶油白、浅米色、淡燕麦色、浅焦糖色为主色调，搭配少量深棕色文字，ins风、治愈感、睡眠疗愈主题，简约排版，轻拟物插画点缀，可加入枕头、月亮、星星、热牛奶、香薰、书本、眼罩、窗帘、床铺等元素。整体像专业新媒体设计图，字体工整，适合做知识科普类小红书九宫格。
排版要求：

整张图必须是标准九宫格构图，切分后每一格都能独立成图

每个宫格内容完整居中，不要把标题或正文压在分割线附近
每个格子之间保留明显间隔或细边框，保证裁切后不影响阅读
所有文字使用中文，清晰易读，不要乱码，不要英文
每个宫格都像独立的小红书图文卡片，但视觉风格保持统一
画面精致、真实、自然，不要廉价营销感，不要过度花哨
九宫格具体内容：

第1格（封面）
大标题：让你倒头就睡的8个 tips
副标题：失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏
封面视觉最吸睛，适合做首图，加入柔软床铺、月亮、枕头、眼罩等治愈睡眠元素，标题突出，排版高级。

第2格
标题：1. 睡前1小时别玩手机
正文：蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。
配图元素：手机、月亮、困倦表情的小插画
第3格
标题：2. 睡前把灯光调暗
正文：暖光环境能帮助身体进入“准备睡觉”的状态。
配图元素：床头灯、暖黄色灯光、窗帘
第4格
标题：3. 房间温度别太高
正文：稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。
配图元素：空调、温度计、被子
第5格
标题：4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡
正文：咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。
配图元素：咖啡杯、茶杯、禁止符号

第6格
标题：5. 睡前洗个热水澡
正文：能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。
配图元素：浴室蒸汽、毛巾、热水
第7格
标题：6. 脑子停不下来就写下来
正文：把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。
配图元素：笔记本、钢笔、小台灯
第8格
标题：7. 固定上床时间
正文：每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。
配图元素：时钟、月亮、床
第9格
标题：8. 试试深呼吸放松法
正文：吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。
底部小字：收藏这组，今晚试试看
配图元素：呼吸线条、闭眼人物、星星

画质要求：
高清，高级排版，杂志感，真实可发布，新媒体运营审美，小红书爆款图文风格，文字布局规整，适合直接切图。

Create an original editorial infographic poster for a Chinese lifestyle brand, a 3×3 nine-grid layout optimized for Xiaohongshu (RED) publication, portrait 3:4 ratio, designed to be sliced into 9 individual square cards.

Style/medium: clean flat editorial design with light skeuomorphic illustration accents, ins-style healing aesthetic, magazine-grade new-media layout, professional knowledge-sharing infographic in the spirit of top-tier Xiaohongshu viral covers
Composition: strict 3-column × 3-row nine-grid layout, each cell clearly separated by thin visible borders or consistent gutters, every cell self-contained and centered so content remains fully readable after cropping; no text or title placed near grid dividing lines; generous internal padding per cell
Subject: nine individual sleep-tip cards unified by a single visual language — cream white backgrounds, soft illustration icons, large legible Chinese headings, short body copy; each cell functions as an independent Xiaohongshu image card
Scene/backdrop: pure cream-white to light oat canvas overall; each cell has its own soft warm micro-background (subtle gradient or flat wash) in the palette range; no busy patterns behind text
Lighting/mood: soft, warm, healing, calm — like morning light through linen curtains; no harsh shadows; gentle and premium
Color palette: primary tones are 奶油白 (cream white), 浅米色 (light beige), 淡燕麦色 (pale oat), 浅焦糖色 (light caramel); deep brown (#3B2314 range) used exclusively for body text and fine details; small accent warmth from candlelight amber; palette is cohesive and gentle across all nine cells
Materials/textures: flat vector illustration style with subtle paper-like warmth; no glossy plastic; soft linen feel
Text (verbatim): Cell 1 — large title: "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips"，副标题: "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏"；Cell 2 — "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机" / "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。"；Cell 3 — "2. 睡前把灯光调暗" / "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。"；Cell 4 — "3. 房间温度别太高" / "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。"；Cell 5 — "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡" / "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。"；Cell 6 — "5. 睡前洗个热水澡" / "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。"；Cell 7 — "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来" / "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。"；Cell 8 — "7. 固定上床时间" / "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。"；Cell 9 — "8. 试试深呼吸放松法" / "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。" / 底部小字: "收藏这组，今晚试试看"
Constraints: all text must be Chinese only — no English, no garbled characters; grid lines or gutters must be clearly visible to guide post-production cropping; each cell must be visually complete and balanced independently; illustration icons per cell: Cell 1 = soft bed, crescent moon, pillow, sleep mask; Cell 2 = smartphone, moon, sleepy face doodle; Cell 3 = bedside lamp, warm yellow glow, curtains; Cell 4 = air conditioner, thermometer, duvet; Cell 5 = coffee cup, tea cup, prohibition symbol; Cell 6 = bathroom steam, towel, hot water; Cell 7 = notebook, fountain pen, small desk lamp; Cell 8 = clock, moon, bed; Cell 9 = breath-wave lines, closed-eye figure, stars; female-oriented wellness aesthetic throughout
Avoid: cheap marketing feel, over-decorated backgrounds, English text, garbled or missing Chinese characters, text placed on grid dividing lines, inconsistent cell styles, neon colors, dark mode, heavy drop shadows, busy gradients, watermarks, Behance generic flat style, 8K stuffer labels

染秋 (RAN QIU) 秋季品牌。
 品牌理念：染秋以东方哲学观照自然更迭，意在捕捉秋日流转中的诗意瞬间。品牌从中国传统"染"的工艺美学出发，将秋天的色彩、气息、情绪凝练成可感知的香氛艺术。精选秋季时令植物——桂花、柿子、枫叶、乌龙茶，融合东方香料如肉桂、檀香、琥珀，创造温暖而隽永的秋日记忆。
核心系列：    以"染秋"为题，推出桂花乌龙、琥珀枫叶、柿霜暮色等香调，营造温暖治愈的秋日氛围。

 品牌理念：染秋以东方哲学观照自然更迭，意在捕捉秋日流转中的诗意瞬间。品牌从中国传统"染"的工艺美学出发，将秋天的色彩、气息、情绪凝练成可感知的香氛艺术。精选秋季时令植物——桂花、柿子、枫叶、乌龙茶，融合东方香料如肉桂、檀香、琥珀，创造温暖而隽永的秋日记忆。
核心系列：    以"染秋"为题，推出桂花乌龙、琥珀枫叶、柿霜暮色等香调，营造温暖治愈的秋日氛围。
制作品牌染秋的主色 + 辅色 + 字体规范展示图", "size": "1536x1024", "quality": "medium", "n": 1, "output_format": "png"}

final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing brand style guide asset for 染秋 (RAN QIU), an autumn-themed Oriental fragrance brand, showing primary color, secondary colors, and typography specimens.

Style/medium: clean flat editorial design, brand identity system sheet in the spirit of a high-end Japanese/Chinese luxury brand manual, minimal white space, refined restraint
Composition: portrait layout divided into clear horizontal zones — color swatches row at top, typography specimen block in center, accent detail strip at bottom; generous padding throughout
Subject: brand style guide for 染秋 (RAN QIU) featuring primary color swatch, secondary color swatches, and Chinese/Latin typeface pairings; each swatch labeled with hex code and color name; each typeface shown at multiple weights with sample glyphs
Scene/backdrop: clean off-white or warm ivory background evoking handmade washi paper texture, no photographic scene
Lighting/mood: flat, even, print-ready — no shadows or gradients on background; mood is warm, poetic, autumnal
Color palette: primary color is deep osmanthus amber (rich warm orange-brown, approx #B5541C or similar); secondary palette includes persimmon red (#C0392B range), maple crimson, oolong tea brown, sandalwood beige, and muted sage; black ink for type; ivory/washi white as base — warm tones dominate, cool tones used only as neutrals
Materials/textures: subtle washi paper grain on background only; color swatches are flat matte rectangles with no gloss
Text (verbatim): "染秋" "RAN QIU" "桂花乌龙" "琥珀枫叶" "柿霜暮色"
Constraints: all Chinese characters must render correctly and legibly; color swatch labels must include hex codes; typography zone must show at least two weights (regular + bold or light + regular); layout must be print-safe with no bleed artifacts; scalable to A4 portrait
Avoid: gradients on swatches, neon or cool-toned colors, Western sans-serif only (must include a Chinese-compatible typeface), cluttered layout, drop shadows, generic Behance brand board aesthetic, lorem ipsum placeholder text

final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an original UI design system mockup showcasing Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls in a classic minimal tech style.

Style/medium: clean flat vector UI design system, minimal tech aesthetic in the spirit of Linear / Vercel / Apple HIG — precise geometry, sharp edges, no gradients unless functional
Composition: multi-panel layout — large desktop Dashboard on top, mobile screen and component library (cards, buttons, toggles, inputs) arranged in a structured grid below, isometric-adjacent flat perspective
Subject: full design system spread including: dark-mode web Dashboard with data charts and sidebar nav, mobile app screen with list and bottom tab bar, card components with subtle elevation, button states (default / hover / disabled), toggle switches, sliders, and input fields
Scene/backdrop: pure deep-space dark background (#0A0A0F or equivalent), components floating with soft layered drop shadows to create depth
Lighting/mood: no ambient scene light — depth created entirely through layered semi-transparent surfaces, glowing accent lines, and subtle inner highlights; mood is cold, precise, futuristic
Color palette: near-black base (#0D0D14) as canvas, electric blue (#3B82F6 or cyan #00D4FF) as primary interactive accent, white/light-gray (#E2E8F0) for text and icons, deep purple (#6366F1) as secondary accent — all colors serve functional hierarchy, not decoration
Materials/textures: frosted glass panels (backdrop-filter blur effect implied), hairline 1px borders in semi-transparent white, smooth matte surfaces with zero noise
Constraints: all UI elements must be legible at component scale; spacing system must appear consistent (8pt grid implied); monochrome version must retain full hierarchy through value contrast alone
Avoid: skeuomorphic shadows, rainbow gradients, lens flare, neon glow overload, Dribbble-generic colorful confetti, watermark, 8K stuffer aesthetic, cluttered layout, misaligned elements

final_prompt.prompt:
请根据【中国少数名族服饰】自动生成一张“博物馆图鉴式中文拆解信息图”。
 
要求整张图兼具真实写实主视觉、结构拆解、中文标注、材质说明、纹样寓意、色彩含义和核心特征总结。你需要根据【中国少数名族服饰】自动判断最合适的主体对象、服饰体系、器物结构、时代风格、关键部件、材质工艺、颜色方案与版式结构，用户无需再提供其他信息。
 
整体风格应为：国家博物馆展板、历史服饰图鉴、文博专题信息图，而不是普通海报、古风写真、电商详情页或动漫插画。背景采用米白、绢纸白、浅茶色等纸张质感，整体高级、克制、专业、可收藏。
 
版式固定为：
- 顶部：中文主标题 + 副标题 + 导语
- 左侧：结构拆解区，中文引线标注关键部件，并配局部特写
- 右上：材质 / 工艺 /   质感区，展示真实纹理小样并附说明
- 右中：纹样 / 色彩 /   寓意区，展示主色板、纹样样本和文化解释
- 底部：穿着顺序 / 构成流程图 + 核心特征总结
 
若主题适合人物展示，则以真实人物全身站姿为中央主体；若更适合器物或单体结构，则改为中心主体拆解图，但整体仍保持完整中文信息图形式。所有文字必须为简体中文，清晰、规整、可读，不要乱码、错字、英文或拼音。重点突出真实结构、材质差异、文化说明与图鉴气质。
 
避免：海报感、影楼感、电商感、动漫感、cosplay感、乱标注、错结构、糊字、假材质、过度装饰。

final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original museum-catalogue infographic for Chinese ethnic minority traditional costume, combining photorealistic central figure, structural annotation, Chinese labeling, material swatches, pattern symbolism, color meaning, and feature summary.

Style/medium: National Museum of China exhibition panel meets historical costume atlas; archival illustration fused with photorealistic rendering; restrained, scholarly, collectible — in the spirit of the Palace Museum textile catalogue and Dunhuang research institute documentation
Composition: full-bleed vertical layout divided into five zones — top header band, left structural-annotation column, right-upper material/craft swatch panel, right-middle pattern/color/meaning panel, bottom dressing-sequence flowchart and summary strip; central axis occupied by a full-body standing figure of a Miao ethnic woman in complete festival dress, rendered photorealistically, facing slightly three-quarter toward viewer
Subject: Miao ethnic woman, full-body standing pose, wearing layered silver headdress (银角头饰), indigo hand-pleated skirt (百褶裙), embroidered cross-stitch jacket (刺绣上衣), silver chest ornament collar (银项圈), wrapped leg bindings (绑腿); each garment component clearly separated by fine leader lines with concise simplified-Chinese labels; inset close-up details for collar embroidery and silver headdress prongs
Scene/backdrop: warm off-white xuan-paper texture background (米白绢纸色), subtle aged-paper grain, no photographic environment, no props beyond the figure; faint grid registration marks in pale ink suggesting a technical drawing underlay
Lighting/mood: flat even museum-display lighting with soft top-fill; no dramatic shadows; clinical yet warm, optimized for legibility of textile detail
Color palette: background anchored in warm off-white and pale tea (米白 / 浅茶色); figure palette dominated by deep indigo (靛蓝), silver-grey (银灰), and crimson embroidery accent (朱红); color swatch panel shows five named swatches with simplified-Chinese color names and cultural meaning annotations; overall palette restrained and archival
Materials/textures: indigo batik cotton with visible wax-resist crackle lines; hand-embroidered silk thread with raised cross-stitch texture; hammered silver with repoussé surface; woven hemp binding with diagonal twill weave — each rendered as a rectangular swatch sample (约 40×40 px thumbnail) with a one-line simplified-Chinese material description beneath
Text (verbatim): "中国少数民族服饰图鉴" as main title; "苗族盛装·贵州黔东南" as subtitle; leader-line labels including "银角头饰""刺绣领口""百褶裙""银项圈""绑腿布"; swatch labels including "靛染棉布""手工刺绣""锻银工艺"; bottom strip heading "穿着顺序与构成要素"; feature summary heading "核心特征总结"
Constraints: all body text, labels, captions, and annotations must be simplified Chinese characters only — no English, no pinyin, no garbled characters; leader lines must connect accurately to the correct garment part; layout zones must be visually separated by thin ink rules; figure must be anatomically correct and non-deformed; infographic must read as a museum exhibition panel, not a poster or fashion photo
Avoid: poster aesthetic, photo-studio glamour lighting, e-commerce product-shot feel, anime or illustration style, cosplay styling, misaligned leader lines, incorrect garment structure, blurry or rasterized Chinese characters, fake or painted-on textures, over-decoration, English text anywhere, pinyin romanization

  Upper-right zone: material / craft / texture swatches with Chinese descriptive labels
  Mid-right zone: pattern / color / symbolism zone — primary color palette chips, pattern samples, and cultural meaning annotations in Chinese
  Bottom zone: dressing sequence / construction flow diagram + core characteristics summary panel
  Center: full-body standing figure of a person wearing the complete costume (realistic, dignified, museum-mannequin quality)

final_prompt.prompt: 做一个杭州市4天3晚的旅游地区，要以真实的杭州地图为背景主线，三折叠景区册子图片,著名景区在册子上要有地标特色，悬浮在卡纸上。。旅游攻略模仿（可优化) 第一天：西湖经典游，打卡教科书里的江南 ‌路线：断桥残雪→白堤→孤山→曲院风荷→苏堤春晓→花港观鱼→雷峰塔→柳浪闻莺 ⏰ 建议时间：7:30出发，避开人流高峰 ✨ 必玩亮点 ‌断桥日出：7点前抵达，独享空无一人的水墨画意境 孤山秘境：西泠印社的竹林窗景，秒出古风大片 雷峰塔俯瞰：登顶看西湖全景，傍晚时分金光穿塔超震撼  午餐推荐：楼外楼（东坡肉+龙井虾仁），人均150元 ⚠️ 避坑指南：别坐环湖电瓶车！租共享单车更自由（每小时5元）  第二天：禅意杭州，穿越千年宋韵 ‌路线：灵隐寺→飞来峰造像→法喜寺→宋城  玩法升级 ‌灵隐寺祈福：摸“咫尺西天”照壁沾福气，请网红十八籽手串（46元） 法喜寺机位：最高殿阁俯拍黄墙黛瓦，求姻缘超灵验 宋城必看：《宋城千古情》演出（贵宾席320元），体验全息投影+水上飞人    拍照TIP：法喜寺出口的江南驿古道，光影绝美  晚餐推荐：素描餐厅（榴莲烤鸡+焦糖布丁），人均90元  第三天：九溪烟树徒步，做一日茶山散人 ‌路线：九溪十八涧→龙井村→十里琅珰→云栖竹径  小众玩法 ‌九溪踩水：穿凉鞋踏过石板溪流，感受25℃的绿野仙踪 龙井问茶：村民家品明前龙井（50元/杯），亲手炒茶体验（需预约）   云栖竹径：寻找《卧虎藏龙》同款竹海，偶遇千年枫香树    交通贴士：九溪入口乘摆渡车（8元）直达九溪烟树  晚餐推荐：茶人村（私房桂鱼+香芋煲），人均120元  第四天：文艺收官，解锁杭州AB面 ‌方案A：运河文艺线 拱宸桥→桥西历史街区→小河直街→大兜路香积寺 必体验：中国伞/刀剪剑博物馆（免费）、水上巴士1号线（3元） 方案B：西溪湿地轻奢游 周家村→深潭口（非诚勿扰取景地）→氦气球俯瞰湿地（180元）  伴手礼推荐：   南宋胡记荷花酥（38元/盒） 万事利丝绸方巾（150-300元）  住宿红黑榜   ✅ 西湖边优选：杭州君悦酒店（湖景房超绝）、青芝坞民宿（人均200元） ❌ 避雷区域：火车站周边老破小，隔音差且价格虚高  交通干货 地铁支付宝领“杭州地铁乘车码” 萧山机场→西湖：地铁1号线直达（7元/50分钟） 灵隐寺专线：龙翔桥地铁站乘7W路（5元）

final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original marketing trifold brochure for a 4-day 3-night Hangzhou tourism itinerary, using a real Hangzhou city map as the background, with landmark icons floating above a card-stock surface.

Style/medium: high-fidelity print design mockup, flat-lay product photography style, trifold pamphlet physically folded and floating above a light cardstock surface with soft drop shadow; map background references authentic Hangzhou street cartography with illustrated landmark icons in a Lonely Planet / National Geographic travel guide aesthetic
Composition: three-quarter aerial view of the open trifold brochure, all three panels visible simultaneously, slight perspective tilt, shot with a 50mm equivalent lens, generous white cardstock mat beneath
Subject: trifold tourism brochure for "杭州市4天3晚旅游攻略"; Panel 1 (cover) — illustrated West Lake 西湖 panorama with Leifeng Pagoda 雷峰塔 silhouette, bold Chinese/English title; Panel 2 (center) — real Hangzhou city map as base layer with color-coded route lines for all 4 days, floating pin icons for 断桥残雪, 灵隐寺, 飞来峰, 九溪十八涧, 龙井村, 云栖竹径, 拱宸桥, 西溪湿地; Panel 3 (back) — day-by-day itinerary text blocks with emoji markers (⏰✨⚠️), meal recommendations, transport tips, and souvenir picks
Scene/backdrop: clean off-white textured cardstock surface, subtle linen grain, soft neutral studio light; no busy background
Lighting/mood: soft diffused overhead studio light with gentle warm fill from the left, casting a clean layered drop shadow under the brochure; calm, refined, travel-editorial mood
Color palette: West Lake celadon green as dominant brand color, warm ink-wash beige as paper base, accent red for landmark pins, soft gold for section headers — colors reference traditional Song-dynasty palette
Materials/textures: matte coated paper surface with slight sheen on the map panel, embossed title lettering on cover, visible paper fold crease lines, cardstock mat with linen texture
Text (verbatim): "杭州市4天3晚旅游攻略" on cover; day labels "第一天：西湖经典游" / "第二天：禅意杭州" / "第三天：九溪烟树徒步" / "第四天：文艺收官"; landmark names 断桥残雪, 白堤, 孤山, 曲院风荷, 苏堤春晓, 花港观鱼, 雷峰塔, 柳浪闻莺, 灵隐寺, 飞来峰, 法喜寺, 宋城, 九溪十八涧, 龙井村, 十里琅珰, 云栖竹径, 拱宸桥, 西溪湿地; price callouts 46元, 320元, 50元/杯, 180元, 38元/盒, 150-300元; transport notes 地铁1号线, 7W路, 水上巴士1号线
Constraints: all four day-route lines must be visually distinct colors on the map panel; landmark pin icons must be recognizable mini-illustrations (pagoda, temple gate, bamboo, bridge); trifold must appear physically printed and folded, not a flat digital mockup; brochure must look self-contained and print-ready at A4 trifold dimensions
Avoid: generic tourist clip-art, blurry map backgrounds, floating text without clear panel structure, oversaturated neon colors, watermarks, lorem ipsum placeholder text, purely digital flat UI appearance

final_prompt.prompt:
Create a tri-fold travel brochure for a 4-day, 3-night Hangzhou self-guided itinerary, with a real Hangzhou map as the central spine.

Style/medium: needs a travel-guide booklet aesthetic with landmark illustration cutouts floating above cardstock — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be tri-fold layout with real 杭州 map as central spine, 4 day-panels divided clearly, each landmark rendered with iconic visual character, floating cardstock shadow effect under each panel
Subject: must include all scenic spots and key info across 4 day-panels:
  Day 1 (西湖经典游): 断桥残雪 / 白堤 / 孤山 / 曲院风荷 / 苏堤春晓 / 花港观鱼 / 雷峰塔 / 柳浪闻莺
  Day 2 (禅意宋韵): 灵隐寺 / 飞来峰造像 / 法喜寺 / 宋城
  Day 3 (九溪茶山): 九溪十八涧 / 龙井村 / 十里琅珰 / 云栖竹径
  Day 4A (运河文艺线): 拱宸桥 / 桥西历史街区 / 小河直街 / 大兜路香积寺
  Day 4B (西溪湿地): 周家村 / 深潭口 / 西溪湿地氦气球
Scene/backdrop: must be a real 杭州 city map base with illustrated route lines connecting all day-panels across the map
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, inviting travel-editorial atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a direction evoking 江南 ink-wash meets modern travel-guide vibrancy — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: must include paper cardstock cutout aesthetic with floating drop shadows beneath each landmark illustration panel
Text (verbatim): must include the following verbatim labels and copy distributed across the 4 day-panels:
  Panel 1: "第一天：西湖经典游" / "断桥残雪" / "白堤" / "孤山" / "曲院风荷" / "苏堤春晓" / "花港观鱼" / "雷峰塔" / "柳浪闻莺" / "楼外楼" / "东坡肉+龙井虾仁 人均150元"
  Panel 2: "第二天：禅意杭州" / "灵隐寺" / "飞来峰造像" / "法喜寺" / "宋城" / "《宋城千古情》" / "素描餐厅 人均90元"
  Panel 3: "第三天：九溪烟树" / "九溪十八涧" / "龙井村" / "十里琅珰" / "云栖竹径" / "茶人村 人均120元"
  Panel 4A: "第四天·方案A：运河文艺线" / "拱宸桥" / "桥西历史街区" / "小河直街" / "大兜路香积寺"
  Panel 4B: "第四天·方案B：西溪湿地" / "深潭口" / "氦气球俯瞰湿地 180元"
  Footer: "伴手礼：南宋胡记荷花酥 38元/盒" / "万事利丝绸方巾 150-300元"
Constraints: must preserve real geographic accuracy of 杭州 map base; all 4 day-panels must be visible and clearly separated; tri-fold structure must be legible; floating cardstock shadow effect must appear under each panel
Avoid: must avoid generic tourist-map clip-art style; must avoid flat non-layered layout

Style/medium: clean flat UI mockup, bright and airy feminine aesthetic, floral accents with purple flowers, Figma/Sketch-style high-fidelity wireframe with real copy
Composition: full-width desktop landing page layout, three-column hero section — left text column, center model, right product column — with header bar at top and benefit cards strip at bottom
Subject: complete landing page hero mockup with the following structure —
  • Header: logo "LUMEA BEAUTY" on the left, 5 navigation links ["特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ"] centered, CTA button "今すぐ試す" on the right
  • Left column: large headline "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", subheadline "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。", three pill-shaped feature badges with small icons ["敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える"], three bullet points with pink checkmarks ["美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア"], two CTA buttons ["初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >"], trust badge strip "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし"
  • Center column: young East Asian woman smiling and touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of moisturizing boost serum
  • Right column: two product items (moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle + packaging box), three floating white rounded-rectangle stat cards with gold accents ["満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破"]
  • Bottom strip: three horizontal white rounded-rectangle benefit cards with icons ["うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"]

final_prompt.prompt:
生成一张韩国咖啡馆风格的时尚咖啡和甜点的照片。像是用智能手机拍摄的、适合发到Instagram的照片。没有人物。然后，观察照片中出现的元素，并为每个元素添加有意义的手绘注释。
【描写规则】
・像用白色笔画出那样的细手绘线条
・一笔写成风格的粗糙、略微不均匀
・像描摹物体外周那样添加轮廓线
・用箭头或虚线制造视线引导
【文本规则】
・日语手写文字（平假名7成、简单汉字3成）
・简短，像自言自语一样的评论
・语气是“日记・一言・情感寄托”
【评论生成规则】
・饮料 → 味道・温度・心情（例：清爽、温柔的甜味）
・食物 → 口感・美味（例：湿润、最高）
・空间 → 氛围（例：放松、美好时光）
・整体 → 一言总结（例：幸福过头了～）
【装饰】
・蒸汽、闪闪发光、心形、小表情符号等适度添加
・不过度，留出“空白”
【完成风格】
・Instagram故事风、杂志的粗糙笔记风   ・时尚且轻松的氛围

final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original editorial photo of a Korean café-style flat lay featuring coffee and desserts, with hand-drawn white-pen annotations overlaid on every element, no people.

Style/medium: smartphone Instagram-style photography (simulating iPhone portrait mode, slightly warm film tone), layered with hand-drawn white-ink sketch annotations in a one-stroke rough style — uneven line weight, imperfect strokes, reminiscent of a fashion magazine's rough notebook margin notes; overall feel: Korean café aesthetic meets Japanese diary doodle
Composition: overhead flat-lay or slight 15° tilt top-down angle, 26mm equivalent lens, generous negative space left intentionally for "breathing room" between annotation clusters
Subject: artisan latte with latte art (tulip or rosetta), a slice of moist basque burnt cheesecake or strawberry tart, a small ceramic side dish with macarons or madeleine, all arranged on a pale linen or speckled terrazzo café table surface; no human figures
Scene/backdrop: Korean minimalist café table surface — light beige linen cloth or pale grey terrazzo, soft natural window light from the left, a few dried flower petals or a folded kraft paper bag as props
Lighting/mood: soft diffused morning window light, slightly warm (4800K), gentle shadows, calm and intimate mood — the kind of quiet weekday morning that feels like a personal reward
Color palette: warm cream and oat tones as base, deep espresso brown as anchor, dusty rose and sage green as accents from the food; white annotation lines pop against the warm background
Materials/textures: visible ceramic glaze texture on cup, moist crumb texture on cheesecake cross-section, fine latte foam micro-bubbles, linen weave visible in cloth
Annotations (hand-drawn white pen, rough one-stroke style, placed near each element with arrows or dashed guide lines):
  — Near latte: steam wisps drawn in white, arrow pointing to foam → "ふわふわ〜☁️" and "あったかい、しあわせ"
  — Near cheesecake: outline tracing the slice edge → "しっとり最高…♡" with a small heart doodle
  — Near macaron or madeleine: dashed circle → "甘さが優しい" with a tiny sparkle ✦
  — Corner overall caption in handwritten style: "幸せすぎた午後〜 ☕" with a small smiley face
  — Scattered micro-decorations: tiny steam curls, ✦ sparkles, dotted lines, one small "♡" near the cup handle — all in white, sparse, not overcrowding
Text (verbatim): "ふわふわ〜☁️", "あったかい、しあわせ", "しっとり最高…♡", "甘さが優しい", "幸せすぎた午後〜 ☕"
Constraints: annotations must look hand-drawn with white ink pen, not digital-clean typography; annotation lines must be slightly wobbly and uneven; white space between annotation clusters must be preserved; no people, no hands, no faces
Avoid: overly perfect calligraphy fonts, neon colors, dark moody lighting, cluttered annotations that fill every pixel, generic stock-photo flat lay, watermarks, English text labels, AI-looking smooth vector lines for annotations
